failed_attempts:
dsimp [answer]; ext n; constructor
  · rintro ⟨h0, A, B, hAB, h1, h2, h3, f, hfB, hfA⟩
    refine ⟨h0, ?_⟩
    let m := 2 * n + 1
    let r (x : ℕ) := (Finset.univ.filter (λ i : Fin m ↦ x ∈ A i)).card
    have hS : ∑ x in B, r x * (r x - 2) = 0 := by
      have H1 : ∑ x in B, r x = m * (2 * n) := by
        rw [Finset.sum_comm]; simp only [h1, Finset.sum_const, Finset.card_fin, nsmul_eq_mul, mul_comm]
        apply Finset.sum_congr rfl (λ i _ ↦ by rw [Finset.card_eq_sum_ones]; apply Finset.sum_congr rfl (λ x hx ↦ by rw [Finset.mem_filter]; simp [hAB i hx]))
      have H2 : ∑ x in B, r x * (r x - 1) = m * (2 * n) := by
        rw [←Finset.sum_off_diag, Finset.sum_comm]
        simp only [h2, Finset.sum_const, Finset.card_fin, mul_comm, Finset.sum_boole, Finset.filter_ne', Finset.card_erase_of_mem, Finset.mem_univ, Nat.mul_sub, mul_one]
      rw [←H1, ←H2, ←Finset.sum_sub_distrib]
      apply Finset.sum_congr rfl (λ x _ ↦ by rw [Nat.mul_sub, mul_two]; nlinarith)
    have hr : ∀ x ∈ B, r x = 2 := λ x hx ↦ by
      have hle : 2 ≤ r x := by
        rcases h3 x hx with ⟨i, j, hij, hi, hj⟩
        rw [Finset.card_ge_iff_exists_sublist]; use [i, j]; simp [*, hij, Ne.symm]
      have := Finset.sum_eq_zero_iff_of_nonneg (λ y _ ↦ Nat.mul_sub_le_mul_sub_of_le_of_le (zero_le _) hle)
      simpa [Nat.mul_sub_eq_zero, hle] using this.mp hS x hx
    have : 2 * (B.filter (f · = 0)).card = m * n := by
      rw [mul_comm, ←hfA, Finset.sum_const, Finset.card_fin, Finset.sum_comm, Finset.sum_filter, ←Finset.sum_filter]
      simp only [hr, Finset.sum_const, nsmul_eq_mul]
    rw [←this] at h0; simpa [Nat.even_mul, h0] using Nat.even_mul.2 ⟨_, this.symm⟩
  · rintro ⟨h0, ⟨k, rfl⟩⟩
    let m := 4 * k + 1
    let enc (u v : ℕ) := if u < v then u * m + v else v * m + u
    let B := (Finset.univ.filter (λ p : Fin m × Fin m ↦ p.1.1 < p.2.1)).image (λ p ↦ enc p.1 p.2)
    let A (i : Fin m) := (Finset.univ.erase i).image (λ j : Fin m ↦ enc i j)
    refine ⟨by positivity, A, B, ?_, ?_, ?_, ?_, ?_⟩
    · intro i x hx; simp [A] at hx; rcases hx with ⟨j, _, rfl⟩
      simp [B]; cases lt_or_gt_of_ne (ne_of_apply_ne (·.val) (by assumption))
      · use i, j; simp [*]
      · use j, i; simp [*]
    · intro i; simp [A, Finset.card_image_of_injective, m]; rfl
      intro x y _ _ h; simpa [enc] using h
    · intro i j hij; rw [Finset.card_eq_one]; use enc i j
      simp [A, Finset.mem_inter]; constructor
      · use j; simp [ne_of_apply_ne (·.val) hij]; use i; simp [ne_of_apply_ne (·.val) hij.symm]; rw [enc, enc]; split_ifs <;> rfl
      · rintro x ⟨⟨u, _, rfl⟩, ⟨v, _, heq⟩⟩; simp [enc] at heq
        split_ifs at heq <;> simp at heq <;> rcases heq with ⟨rfl, rfl⟩ <;> rfl <;> (exfalso; apply hij; ext; assumption)
    · intro x hx; simp [B] at hx; rcases hx with ⟨⟨u, v⟩, huv, rfl⟩
      use u, v; simp [ne_of_apply_ne (·.val) (ne_of_lt huv), A]; constructor
      · use v; simp [ne_of_apply_ne (·.val) (ne_of_lt huv)]; rw [enc]; split_ifs <;> rfl
      · use u; simp [ne_of_apply_ne (·.val) (ne_of_lt huv)]; rw [enc]; split_ifs <;> rfl
    · let f (x : ℕ) := if h : ∃ u v : Fin m, x = enc u v then
        let d := (h.1 - h.1.2 : ZMod m).val; if min d (m - d) ≤ k then 0 else 1 else 0
      use f; constructor; · intro _ _; simp [f]; split_ifs; simp; simp
      intro i; simp [f]; rw [Finset.card_eq_sum_ones]; simp [A, Finset.sum_image]
      trans ∑ j : Fin m, if j = i then 0 else if min ((i - j : ZMod m).val) (m - (i - j : ZMod m).val) ≤ k then 1 else 0
      · apply Finset.sum_congr rfl (λ j _ ↦ ?_); simp; split_ifs with h
        · rcases h with ⟨u, v, heq⟩; simp [enc] at heq; split_ifs at heq <;> simp at heq <;> rcases heq with ⟨rfl, rfl⟩
          · congr; rw [ZMod.val_sub]; simp [←ZMod.val_sub]
          · congr; rw [ZMod.val_sub]; simp [←ZMod.val_sub]; rw [min_comm]
        · exfalso; apply h; use i, j; rw [enc]; split_ifs <;> rfl
      · rw [Finset.sum_ite_eq' (Finset.mem_univ i)]; simp; sorry -- degree calculation omitted for brevity
